'''âd-m-j''' ('''damaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:limpen|limpen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-m-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:limpen|limpen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-m-j
|-
! Lemma
| damaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:damajithi|damajithi]] || [[word:damajiji|damajiji]] || [[word:damajishi|damajishi]] || [[word:damaji|damaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:damajuthuth|damajuthuth]] || [[word:damajujuj|damajujuj]] || [[word:damajushush|damajushush]] || [[word:damaj|damaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:damajuthu|damajuthu]] || [[word:damajuju|damajuju]] || [[word:damajushu|damajushu]] || [[word:damaju|damaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:damajufuth|damajufuth]] || [[word:damajufuj|damajufuj]] || [[word:damajufush|damajufush]] || [[word:damajuf|damajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:damajethe|damajethe]] || [[word:damajeje|damajeje]] || [[word:damajeshe|damajeshe]] || [[word:damaje|damaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:damajothoth|damajothoth]] || [[word:damajojoj|damajojoj]] || [[word:damajoshosh|damajoshosh]] || [[word:damaj|damaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:damajotho|damajotho]] || [[word:damajojo|damajojo]] || [[word:damajosho|damajosho]] || [[word:damajo|damajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:damajofoth|damajofoth]] || [[word:damajofoj|damajofoj]] || [[word:damajofosh|damajofosh]] || [[word:damajof|damajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:damajĂŠthĂŠ|damajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:damajĂŠjĂŠ|damajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:damajĂŠshĂŠ|damajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:damajĂŠ|damajĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:damajathath|damajathath]] || [[word:damajajaj|damajajaj]] || [[word:damajashash|damajashash]] || [[word:damaj|damaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:damajatha|damajatha]] || [[word:damajaja|damajaja]] || [[word:damajasha|damajasha]] || [[word:damaja|damaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:damajafath|damajafath]] || [[word:damajafaj|damajafaj]] || [[word:damajafash|damajafash]] || [[word:damajaf|damajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:damajasha|damajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godamajasha|godamajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidamajasha|gokidamajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:damajnĂŒsha|damajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godamajnknĂŒsha|godamajnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidamajnĂŒsha|gokidamajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:damajshĂ«sha|damajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godamajnkshĂ«sha|godamajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidamajshĂ«sha|gokidamajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:damajrosha|damajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godamajnkrosha|godamajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidamajrosha|gokidamajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:damajmusha|damajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godamajnkmusha|godamajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidamajmusha|gokidamajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:damajsherasha|damajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godamajnksherasha|godamajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidamajsherasha|gokidamajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:damajngasha|damajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godamajnkngasha|godamajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidamajngasha|gokidamajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:damajyasha|damajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godamajnkyasha|godamajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidamajyasha|gokidamajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:damajyamasha|damajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godamajnkyamasha|godamajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidamajyamasha|gokidamajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:damajnĂŒshĂ«sha|damajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godamajnknĂŒshĂ«sha|godamajnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidamajnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokidamajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:damajnĂŒrosha|damajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godamajnknĂŒrosha|godamajnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidamajnĂŒrosha|gokidamajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:damajnĂŒmusha|damajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godamajnknĂŒmusha|godamajnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidamajnĂŒmusha|gokidamajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:damajshĂ«nĂŒsha|damajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godamajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|godamajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidamajshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokidamajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:damajshĂ«rosha|damajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godamajnkshĂ«rosha|godamajnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidamajshĂ«rosha|gokidamajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:damajshĂ«musha|damajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godamajnkshĂ«musha|godamajnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidamajshĂ«musha|gokidamajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:damajronĂŒsha|damajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godamajnkronĂŒsha|godamajnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidamajronĂŒsha|gokidamajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:damajroshĂ«sha|damajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godamajnkroshĂ«sha|godamajnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidamajroshĂ«sha|gokidamajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:damajromusha|damajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godamajnkromusha|godamajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidamajromusha|gokidamajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:damajmunĂŒsha|damajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godamajnkmunĂŒsha|godamajnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidamajmunĂŒsha|gokidamajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:damajmushĂ«sha|damajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godamajnkmushĂ«sha|godamajnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidamajmushĂ«sha|gokidamajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:damajmurosha|damajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godamajnkmurosha|godamajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidamajmurosha|gokidamajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:damaj|damaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dĂŠmĂŠj|dĂŠmĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodamaj|hodamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodĂŠmĂŠj|hodĂŠmĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodamaj|hohodamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodĂŠmĂŠj|hohodĂŠmĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒdamaj|nĂŒdamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒdĂŠmĂŠj|nĂŒdĂŠmĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒdamaj|nĂŒnĂŒdamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒdĂŠmĂŠj|nĂŒnĂŒdĂŠmĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻdamaj|nĂŻdamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻdĂŠmĂŠj|nĂŻdĂŠmĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻdamaj|nĂŻnĂŻdamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻdĂŠmĂŠj|nĂŻnĂŻdĂŠmĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludamaj|ludamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludĂŠmĂŠj|ludĂŠmĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludamaj|luludamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludĂŠmĂŠj|luludĂŠmĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidamaj|lidamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidĂŠmĂŠj|lidĂŠmĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidamaj|lilidamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidĂŠmĂŠj|lilidĂŠmĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodamaj|kodamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodĂŠmĂŠj|kodĂŠmĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodamaj|kokodamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodĂŠmĂŠj|kokodĂŠmĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedamaj|kedamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedĂŠmĂŠj|kedĂŠmĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedamaj|kekedamaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedĂŠmĂŠj|kekedĂŠmĂŠj]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
